content.rendered:
Welcome to the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Hub for Nonprofits! The AI Hub is an actively curated list of the most useful AI tools and resources for nonprofits found on the internet. To request an addition to the list, please post it to our Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Nonprofit Organizations LinkedIn Group.

Articles

• [Report] The 2026 State of AI Adoption in Canadian Nonprofits by Imagine Canada
• 6 Smart Ask Amount Best Practices for Nonprofits by Nonprofit Tech for Good
• How Nonprofits Can Show Up in AI Chatbots by Viva Strategic Communications
• 2026 AI Marketing & Fundraising Statistics by Nonprofit Tech for Good
• Your Nonprofit’s 10-Step Guide to AI Implementation by Journey to Impact

» More articles

Podcasts

• The AI Dilemma [Center for Humane Technology]
• How to Put AI to Work for Your Nonprofit [Big Duck]
• The 10 Blue Links Era is Over [Whole Whale]

» More podcasts

Resources

• AI4NGO provides NGOs worldwide with the AI tools and training necessary to increase their impact and address critical global and local challenges.

• The Marketing Artificial Intelligence Institute offers free webinars, a podcast, a comprehensive weekly newsletter, and blog content about how AI is shaping marketing, politics, and economics.

• AI for Nonprofits is a shared knowledge exchange to help nonprofits ethically and effectively adopt AI.

» More resources

Tools

• Avid offers a free version to a fundraising intelligence dashboard that features annual fundraising benchmarks (the paid version is updated daily).

• aiCarousels simplifies the process of creating carousel content for social media.

• Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) Grader by Hubspot reveals how leading AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini interpret your brand. As an example, view the Nonprofit Tech for Good AEO Report.

» More tools

Webinars

• Work Smarter, Not Just Faster with AI by Fundraising.AI
• Measuring Your AI Brand Footprint by Whole Whale
• Navigating the AI Fundraising Landscape by Dataro
• Unleashing AI for Nonprofits by The Digital Nonprofit
• How to AI-Proof Your Career by Nonprofit Tech for Good
• AI Ethics and Policy for Nonprofits by Whole Whale

Join

Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Nonprofit Organizations LinkedIn Group

Learn

The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, balanced approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward. Customized for nonprofit professionals, this webinar series will expand your skill set, advance your career, and help transition your nonprofit into the age of AI.

• The Best AI Fundraising & Productivity Tools for Nonprofits
• The Use of AI in Fundraising: Maximizing Donations with Data-Driven Asks
• 8 Artificial Intelligence Concepts & Terms for Nonprofits
• 7 Tips for Standout Nonprofit Website Content in the Age of AI
• 4 Ways Nonprofits Can Start Using AI in 2024
• Creating a Nonprofit Digital Strategy with ChatGPT: A Practical Guide
